info.name: Rekko AI — Prediction Market Intelligence
info.description: The brain for prediction market trading. Deep AI research, Bayesian causal decomposition, portfolio-aware strategy signals, cross-platform arbitrage, and execution guidance — all in one API. Covers Kalshi, Polymarket, Robinhood, and Coinbase. Clean flat JSON designed for developers and autonomous trading agents.

item.name: Analytics
item.description: Calibration metrics, sentiment, and performance tracking

request.description: Health check with data freshness and platform coverage stats.
Return tier pricing for all feed endpoints (no auth required).

Internal metrics for tracking acquisition-readiness KPIs.

Returns active developers, monthly API calls, calls by tier/auth method,
and platform coverage. Admin access only.
Signal accuracy and calibration metrics (free, no auth required).
Aggregate market sentiment from price momentum and volume trends.
Win rate, P&L, ROI, and edge metrics.
Daily P&L time series for equity curve charting.

item.name: Markets
item.description: Prediction market listings, history, resolution, and execution guidance

request.description:
List prediction market events grouped with aggregate stats.

Events group related individual markets (e.g., "Who will leave the Trump
administration?" groups 32 individual outcome markets). Sorted by
aggregate 24h volume descending.

Top prediction market events by trending score.

Combines featured status, volume, and recency. Designed for AI agents
that want a quick overview of what's hot in prediction markets.

Search events using hybrid full-text + semantic vector search.

Finds events matching by keyword ("Iran") and by meaning ("US military
Middle East" matches "US forces enter Iran"). Uses Reciprocal Rank
Fusion to combine both signals.

Get a single event with aggregate stats and optionally all its markets.

Use ?expand=markets to include individual outcome markets in the response.

List all individual outcome markets within an event.

Returns markets sorted by 24h volume descending.

query.description: Search markets by keyword in title (case-insensitive)

request.description:
List current prediction markets with pricing data.

Use ?query= to search by keyword (e.g. ?query=bitcoin).
Use ?source= to filter by platform.

item.name: Strategy
item.description: Actionable trading signals with Kelly-derived position sizing and causal decomposition

query.description: Block until analysis completes (up to 5 min)

request.description:
Generate an actionable strategy signal for a market.

Default: returns 202 with analysis_id for polling.
With ?wait=true: blocks until pipeline completes (30-90 seconds).
If a cached analysis exists (<24h): returns immediately.
Use "force": true to bypass cache.

response.body:

request.description:
Analyze how a hypothetical scenario would affect a market's probability.

Accepts either JSON body or query parameters. Strategy tier ($2.00/call).
